powers.name: Weak

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Winged Boots
relics.description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next rooms to travel to [blue]0[/blue] times.

relics.name: Chandelier
relics.description: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Tea of Discourtesy
relics.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

relics.name: Planisphere
relics.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]5[/green] HP.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: White Beast Statue
relics.description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.

relics.name: Archaic Tooth
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]Neutralize+[/gold] into [gold]Suppress+[/gold].

relics.name: Daughter of the Wind
relics.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Vexing Puzzlebox
relics.description: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue].

relics.name: Preserved Fog
relics.description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]3[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: History Course
relics.description: At the start of your turn, play a copy of your last played Attack or Skill.

relics.name: Gorget
relics.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].

relics.name: Bronze Scales
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random Attacks.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Lava Rock
relics.description: The Act 1 Boss drops [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].

relics.name: Centennial Puzzle
relics.description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.

relics.name: Planisphere
relics.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]5[/green] HP.

relics.name: Strike Dummy
relics.description: Cards containing “Strike” deal [blue]3[/blue] additional damage.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Molten Egg
relics.description: Whenever you add an Attack card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

relics.name: Archaic Tooth
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]Neutralize[/gold] into [gold]Suppress[/gold].

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

relics.name: Bronze Scales
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].

relics.name: The Chosen Cheese
relics.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Lava Rock
relics.description: The Act 1 Boss drops [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].

relics.name: Centennial Puzzle
relics.description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.

relics.name: Planisphere
relics.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]5[/green] HP.

relics.name: Strike Dummy
relics.description: Cards containing “Strike” deal [blue]3[/blue] additional damage.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Molten Egg
relics.description: Whenever you add an Attack card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

relics.name: Archaic Tooth
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]Neutralize[/gold] into [gold]Suppress[/gold].

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

relics.name: The Chosen Cheese
relics.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

relics.name: Preserved Fog
relics.description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]3[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: Forgotten Soul
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Anchor
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Ripple Basin
relics.description: If you did not play any Attacks during your turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Reptile Trinket
relics.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Dexterity
player_powers_snapshot.description: Dexterity improves Block gained from cards.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Afterimage
player_powers_snapshot.description: Whenever you play a card, gain 1 Block.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Chains of Binding
player_powers_snapshot.description: The first 3 cards drawn each turn are Afflicted with Bound.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Frail
player_powers_snapshot.description: While Frail, gain 25% less Block from cards.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Weak
player_powers_snapshot.description: Weakened creatures deal 25% less damage with Attacks.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Vulnerable
player_powers_snapshot.description: Vulnerable creatures take 50% more damage from Attacks.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Accuracy
player_powers_snapshot.description: Shivs deal additional damage.

player_powers_snapshot.name: Envenom
player_powers_snapshot.description: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply 1 Poison.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Lava Rock
relics.description: The Act 1 Boss drops [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].

relics.name: Centennial Puzzle
relics.description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.

relics.name: Planisphere
relics.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]5[/green] HP.

relics.name: Strike Dummy
relics.description: Cards containing “Strike” deal [blue]3[/blue] additional damage.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Molten Egg
relics.description: Whenever you add an Attack card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

relics.name: Archaic Tooth
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]Neutralize[/gold] into [gold]Suppress[/gold].

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

relics.name: The Chosen Cheese
relics.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

relics.name: Preserved Fog
relics.description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]3[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: Forgotten Soul
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Anchor
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Ripple Basin
relics.description: If you did not play any Attacks during your turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Reptile Trinket
relics.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

relics.name: Art of War
relics.description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img] next turn.

relics.name: Lantern
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].
